strategy: Challenge finale at 47,780 Health. He shields himself every Round on a three-Round cycle: -25% (R1), -50% (R2), -90% (R3), then repeating, and the shields pile up.
Plan your kill for Round 4 or 7, the start of a cycle, when only the fresh -25% Tower Shield is up.
Bring Shatter or a multi-hit spell to strip shields before your real hit lands.
Hit Life. He resists Myth 68% and most schools 48%, but only 28% to Life, so prism into Life if needed.
Do not slow-play. With 184% boost and 47% pierce on his side, funnel blades to one hitter and burst.
cheatNotes: Start of Round 1 and every three Rounds after, he casts a -25% Tower Shield on himself.
Start of Round 2 and every three Rounds after, he casts a -50% Tower Shield.
Start of Round 3 and every three Rounds after, he casts a -90% Tower Shield. Shields stack, so kill at the start of a cycle when only the -25% is fresh.
